title: rvoptkb-extract Output
description: Lightweight output JSON produced by the rvoptkb-extract skill. Contains patch info plus concise thought text and idea category as quick-reference pointers. Full structured data lives in the idea pool (pool/idea-pool.json).

patch.description: Original patch information (mirrored from input for standalone reference)

patch_subject.description: First line of the commit message

thought.description: Extracted optimization technique as a single actionable sentence (EoK Layer 2)
examples: Use LMUL dynamic tuning (m1→m8/m4/m2) to maximize vector register utilization in GEMM kernels on RISC-V V extension hardware

idea.description: Idea title for quick classification (EoK Layer 1). Full structured idea data lives in the pool.
examples: RVV LMUL Dynamic Tuning in GEMM Kernels
